allow: PowerShell(docker exec scanops-celery-worker sh -c "python3 -m py_compile /app/services/scanner_engine/services/nuclei_wrapper.py /app/services/scanner_engine/tasks/vuln_tasks.py && echo COMPILE_OK")

PowerShell(docker exec scanops-m4 python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'/app/services/exploit_engine'\); from testssl_client import get_testssl_client; c = get_testssl_client\(\); print\('OK', type\(c\)\)")
PowerShell(docker exec scanops-postgres psql -U scanops -c "SELECT id, cve_id, target_ip, status FROM m4_approvals ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8009/auth/token" -Method POST -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -Body "username=admin&password=scanops_admin_2026"\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty access_token; Write-Host "TOKEN OK: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)...")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8009/auth/token" -Method POST -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -Body "username=admin&password=scanops_admin_2026" -UseBasicParsing; $token = $resp.access_token; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8004/api/m4/execute?approval_id=1" -Method POST -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing; $r | ConvertTo-Json)
PowerShell(docker exec scanops-postgres psql -U scanops -c "SELECT id, status, cve_id, target_ip FROM m4_approvals ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8009/auth/token" -Method POST -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -Body "username=admin&password=scanops_admin_2026" -UseBasicParsing; $token = $resp.access_token; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8004/api/m4/execute?approval_id=1" -Method POST -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | ConvertTo-Json)
